# TODO_paper_title — ARA Manifest

ARA-compatible artifact root for this package. Replace every TODO with
content from your paper.

## Layer Index

- `logic/` — problem, claims, concepts, experiments, solution.
- `src/` — configs and execution recipes (placeholders).
- `trace/exploration_tree.yaml` — branch tree.
- `evidence/` — tables, figures, logs.

Each claim with `support_level: explicit` must include non-empty
`source_refs` citing the paper or external evidence. Each `inferred`
or `expert_reconstructed` branch must say so explicitly in its YAML.
